motivation: I am passionate about building clean, modular architectures that scale. Your team's commitment to developer experience and premium user interfaces matches my career goals perfectly. I would love to contribute my Go microservices and React performance expertise to help you build the next-generation developer tooling.
techChallenge: Redesigned a legacy monolith's real-time events pipeline. Replaced long-polling with a Go-based WebSocket hub and implemented Redis Pub/Sub for horizontal scaling. Reduced server CPU overhead by 70% and latency from 1.5s to < 80ms while maintaining 10k concurrent active connections.

motivation: As a design-focused engineer, I care deeply about micro-interactions, responsive fluid designs, and core web vitals. I'm excited by the gorgeous aesthetic and responsive performance of your products, and I want to bring my frontend expertise to help keep the user experience premium and state-of-the-art.
techChallenge: Built an interactive web-based design editor canvas from scratch using raw React hooks, canvas rendering context, and SVG overlays. Integrated custom undo/redo command history stacks and optimized layout paint boundaries, improving frame rate from 24fps to a smooth 60fps on low-end devices.

motivation: I enjoy solving problems behind the scenes, such as optimizing queries and writing robust API integrations. I am looking for a team that values clean code practices, testing, and continuous deployment where I can grow my backend engineering career.
techChallenge: Optimized database queries in a high-volume REST API. Added composite indices and restructured complex N+1 SQL joins in Prisma/Sequelize, reducing server response times on search queries by 85% under heavy stress testing.
